cases.name: cli_review
cases.prompt: Review a CLI that prints colored tables and spinners by default, has no --json mode, returns 0 for validation errors, and only supports interactive prompts.
assertions: flags accessibility risks from colors, tables, and spinners
requires non-interactive flags or config for automation
recommends meaningful non-zero exit codes for failures
separates stdout data from stderr diagnostics

cases.name: new_cli_design
cases.prompt: Design the command structure, help output, and onboarding for a project scaffolding CLI.
assertions: starts from install and first useful command journey
includes -h/--help on main command and subcommands
uses consistent verbs/nouns and guessable flags
includes examples before exhaustive reference detail
includes shell completion and man page/documentation considerations

cases.name: accessible_output
cases.prompt: A CLI uses emoji-only statuses, ASCII art banners, and progress spinners. Make it accessible while keeping human-friendly output.
assertions: does not rely on emoji or color alone
honors NO_COLOR, TERM=dumb, non-TTY, and CI
keeps optional enhanced output gated behind capability checks
